A1.name: Ignore displacement_blocked
A1.risk_note: Relaxing displacement may increase drawdown; capacity unchanged.
A1.expected_improvement: neutral_to_negative if avg executed PnL stays negative

A2.name: Ignore max_positions_reached
A2.expected_improvement: low; more positions can worsen tail.

A3.name: Lower expectancy score floor by one notch
A3.risk_note: Lower floor admits lower-score trades; backtest recommended.
A3.expected_improvement: moderate if score band 2.5-3.0 is profitable.

B1.name: Extend minimum hold by +15 min
B1.expectancy_delta_note: Excluding early exits may reduce churn; hold vs drawdown TBD.
B1.expected_improvement: moderate if early exits are net negative.

B2.name: Remove early signal_decay exits
B2.expectancy_delta_note: Removing early decay may extend winners; test on replay.
B2.expected_improvement: moderate if early decay cuts winners.

B3.name: Favor TP over time-based exits
B3.hold_time_vs_drawdown_note: Current mix is time/signal_decay heavy; TP favor needs rule change.
B3.expected_improvement: moderate if TP captures more upside.

C1.name: Re-rank block reasons by realized opportunity cost
C1.expected_improvement: Prioritize relaxing blocks with highest negative opportunity cost.

C2.name: Identify blocks that correlate with positive counterfactual PnL
C2.good_vetoes_note: Blocks that would have lost (need estimate_blocked_outcome per block).
C2.missed_winners_note: Blocks that would have won (same). Run counter_intelligence_analysis on droplet for full C2.
C2.expected_improvement: High if we can relax only 'missed winner' blocks.

recommendations.A1: Test (gate relaxation; run in paper first)
recommendations.A2: Test (gate relaxation; run in paper first)
recommendations.C1: Promote (re-rank informs which gate to relax first)

risk_notes.A1: Displacement relaxation increases exposure; monitor drawdown.
risk_notes.A3: Lower score floor may admit worse entries; validate with backtest.
risk_notes.B1: Min hold extension may increase drawdown in fast reversals.
risk_notes.B2: Removing early signal_decay may hold losers longer.
risk_notes.B3: TP favor requires rule change; test on replay.
risk_notes.C1: Opportunity cost is proxy; use for prioritization only.
risk_notes.C2: Full C2 requires estimate_blocked_outcome per block.

persona_verdicts.adversarial: Test A3 first (lower score floor): if the blocked score band is profitable, we are over-blocking; if not, we keep the floor. No live change until backtest.
persona_verdicts.quant: Test C1 first: re-ranking by opportunity cost gives a clear order for which gate to relax; then validate with A1/A2/A3 tests.
persona_verdicts.product_operator: Test B2 first (remove early signal_decay): quickest exit-policy change to validate on replay; if early decay exits are net negative, removing them improves expectancy.
persona_verdicts.risk: Test A2 last; prioritize B1 or B3 (exit behavior) over gate relaxation to avoid concentration. Promote C1 for decision order.
persona_verdicts.execution_sre: Test B1 first (extend min hold): single parameter, easy rollback; then C1 for prioritization. No live config change until tests pass.
